instructions: Add 'set -euo pipefail' to the beginning of the scripts if not already present.
Implement a standard error trap handler: `trap 'logger -t "$(basename "$0")" "ERROR at line $LINENO"' ERR`.
Ensure error handling logs are explicitly sent to the system logger.
Do not alter the functional logic of the setup or partition scripts.
constraints: Strictly limit modifications to error handling additions.
Do not introduce new external dependencies.
Ensure compatibility with the airootfs execution environment.
